basic_details.job_title: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Director General of Foreign Trade Hyderabad (DGFT)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 10-06-2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Economics from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University - Min 65%, B Tech/BE/MCA from a recognized University - Min 65%, Masters in Commerce from a recognized University - Min 65%
qualification.details: Masters in Economics from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Business Administration from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. B.Tech/B.E./MCA from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks. Masters in Commerce from a recognized University with a minimum of 65% marks.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Young Professional posts at DGFT Hyderabad is 03-07-2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Young Professional position in the Director General of Foreign Trade Hyderabad recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Economics, Business Administration, or Commerce, or a B.Tech/B.E./MCA from a recognized university with at least 65% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 35 years, as of 10-06-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional role will be offered a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional posts will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Young Professional positions are on a contractual basis. This is a temporary engagement.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DGFT Hyderabad office located?
faq.answer: The DGFT Hyderabad office is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with a pincode of 500080.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Telangana apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. However, it is always best to check the detailed official notification for any specific state-wise eligibility criteria.
